complaint: This morning the car just clicked rapidly and wouldn't start, all the lights flickered and I thought the whole electrical system was fried.
observations: Rapid clicking on key, no crank; jump start fires immediately
Battery tests bad with high internal resistance, ~5 years old
Terminals show corrosion buildup, alternator charges correctly once running
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target 'battery'.
